creator: s.bilberry@gmail.com
text:
This is a known bug: https://bugzilla.wikimedia.org/show_bug.cgi?id=58640 which doesn't have a fix, yet. Other MediaWiki versions are also impacted.

Fix: 

Manual downgrade to pcre-8.33 and a restart of PHP5 module.
How-To-Repeat: Perform an upgrade of devel/pcre to 8.34
